scripts.db:migrate: HOME=$PWD wrangler d1 migrations apply social_media_scheduler_db --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: HOME=$PWD wrangler d1 migrations apply social_media_scheduler_db --remote
scripts.e2e:prepare: HOME=$PWD wrangler d1 migrations apply social_media_scheduler_db --local --persist-to .wrangler/state/e2e --env-file tests/e2e/.env.e2e && node ./scripts/create-auth-user.mjs --name "Scheduler Admin" --password "test-password-123" --role editor --database social_media_scheduler_db --persist-to .wrangler/state/e2e --env-file tests/e2e/.env.e2e && node ./scripts/seed-e2e-channel-connection.mjs --database social_media_scheduler_db --persist-to .wrangler/state/e2e --env-file tests/e2e/.env.e2e
scripts.e2e:server: npm run e2e:prepare && CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=200 HOME=$PWD wrangler dev --local --persist-to .wrangler/state/e2e --env-file tests/e2e/.env.e2e --ip 127.0.0.1 --port 8788 --inspector-ip 127.0.0.1 --inspector-port 9230 --log-level error --show-interactive-dev-session=false
scripts.quality:gate: npm run quality:gate:fast && npm run quality:gate:browser
scripts.quality:gate:fast: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run security:audit && npm run test:coverage
